title: Cloroxwipes110's Custom Combat
description: A datapack that changes combat completely.
body:
### Cloroxwipes110's Custom Combat

This datapack changes combat at it's core, with new weapons available from the start. This datapack is sure to give you a unique combat experience, with versatile utilities like the Heavy Shield, with lots of durability, gives you some armor, but makes you slower.

## Crafting Recipes:
![Heavy Shield Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2f2ee9384050524802fbd4c9de36a147bc217ab.png)

Heavy Shield: Lots of durability, gives you some armor, makes you slower.

![Dagger](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2245dfb66fb46a44632338fb6f3e1c23268e98d0.png)

Dagger: Varying Material Types, faster charge, less damage, 1 block less interaction range.

![Battle Axe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f19ebfec7d710690acbe054e75dda8e3d77d91e.png)

Battle Axe: Varying Material Types, slower charge, tons of damage, more durability.

![Sword Of Undying](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce411e5efcb34052cc89c47fda9cd60cf9e29a96.png)

Sword Of Undying: Same Damage as a diamond sword, works like a totem of undying.

![Trident](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3cfe98de3b535e1274fc47d48431fb23d6a2ac97.png)

Trident: Uncommon Rarity instead of Epic.

![Speed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91227f7714692b588eb241a07abfb7c11d5c3fa9.png)

Speed Enchantment: Goes up to level 5, applied to boots, makes you faster.

![Reach](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/facf36c0dbe96d905256a0ac15cd4dfc5edd085f.png)

Reach Enchantment: Increases entity and block interaction range.
